measurements.claim: The causal workbench fixture emits CAUSAL_DAG_FIXTURE_MATCH with the exact minimal adjustment set age plus baseline_health and rejects the configured negative controls.
The causal source ledger stores arXiv metadata and digest receipts as source leads rather than promoted causal-discovery, LLM reasoning, biomedical, or medical claims.
The publication copy labels the preflight as a toy DAG fixture and blocks causal-discovery, LLM causal-reasoning, biomedical recommendation, and BuildLang/buildc-native runtime claims for this pass.
